_note: CONCEPTUAL EXAMPLE — This is not a functional configuration. No MCP server exists for Frontier Analytics yet. This file illustrates what an MCP client configuration might look like.

frontier-analytics.description: Conceptual MCP server for the Frontier Analytics prompt library, schema documentation, and analysis tools

prompts.description: Serves prompt cards from frontier-analytics/prompts/ as MCP prompts

resources.description: Exposes schema documentation and data dictionaries as queryable resources

tools.description: Provides validation, computation, and generation tools
